locator.quote: Coverage history must include discarded models.

text: Coverage history must include discarded models: a coverage metric asks 'did we sample this corner?', not 'did we like the result?'.

locator.quote: is still evidence that we explored that bucket.

text: A discarded ppo_lstm_v1 with gamma=0.998 is still evidence that we explored that bucket — so coverage reads every record, not just status=active.

locator.quote: [4.5e-4, 5e-4] — i.e. 99 % of plausible historical samples landed

text: float_log genes need log-space bucket edges: linear deciles put ~99% of plausible historical learning_rate samples in the bottom bucket, falsely reading as unexplored.
